creator: lsantagostini@gmail.com
text:
When i launch qemu launcher and make a click over a button (like file open) is where the crash appears with this error:

pcleo# qemu-launcher 
/libexec/ld-elf.so.1: /usr/local/lib/libgthread-2.0.so.0: Undefined symbol "pthread_getschedparam"

qemu-0.9.0_3
qemu-launcher-1.7.4_1

all made from the ports system

The ports where not updated by any method, just the ports that came on the CD
